name: Enzyme Kinetics Assay (Michaelis-Menten)
nameCn: 酶动力学分析（米氏方程法）

components.name: 1. Purify enzyme to >90% homogeneity; determine concentration

note.en: SDS-PAGE + Coomassie; BCA/Bradford. Use freshly purified or aliquoted protein.
note.zh: SDS-PAGE + 考马斯蓝确认纯度；BCA/Bradford 定量。使用新鲜纯化或分装冻存蛋白。

note.en: Typical: 50 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 1–10 mM MgCl₂ (kinases/ATPases), 1 mM DTT, 0.01% BSA. Use kinase_buffer as start; optimize pH, ions, cofactors.
note.zh: 典型：50 mM HEPES pH 7.5、1–10 mM MgCl₂（激酶/ATPase）、1 mM DTT、0.01% BSA。以 kinase_buffer 为起点优化 pH、离子、辅因子。

note.en: Measure product vs time at saturating [S]. Ensure: (a) <10% substrate consumed, (b) linear product formation. Typical: 0–30 min, sample at 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 30 min.
note.zh: 饱和底物浓度下测产物随时间变化。确保：(a) 底物消耗 <10%，(b) 产物线性生成。典型：0–30 min，在 0、5、10、15、20、30 min 取样。

note.en: E.g., 1, 5, 10, 25, 50, 100, 250, 500 µM. Include [S]=0 (background). Prepare in assay buffer.

components.name: 5. Start reactions: add enzyme last; fixed temperature (25–37°C)

note.en: Fixed [E] (10–100 nM). ≥3 replicates per [S]. Water bath or thermocycler for temperature control.
note.zh: 固定 [E]（10–100 nM）。每个 [S] ≥3 重复。水浴或 PCR 仪控温。

components.name: 6. Stop reactions at fixed timepoint (within linear range)

note.en: Methods: (a) NADH-linked: continuous A₃₄₀ reading; (b) colorimetric: add TCA/HCl; (c) fluorescence: quench buffer; (d) radioactive: spot on P81 paper.
note.zh: 停止方法：(a) NADH 偶联：连续读 A₃₄₀；(b) 比色法：加 TCA/HCl；(c) 荧光：加淬灭液；(d) 放射性：点样于 P81 纸。

components.name: 7. Measure signal; calculate initial velocity V₀

note.en: V₀ = Δ[product]/Δtime in linear range. NADH: ε₃₄₀ = 6,220 M⁻¹cm⁻¹ (Beer-Lambert).
note.zh: V₀ = Δ[产物]/Δ时间（线性范围）。NADH 偶联：ε₃₄₀ = 6,220 M⁻¹cm⁻¹（Beer-Lambert 定律）。

components.name: 8. Fit V₀ vs [S] to Michaelis-Menten equation

note.en: V₀ = Vmax × [S] / (Km + [S]). Nonlinear regression: GraphPad Prism, scipy.optimize.curve_fit, or R nls(). Derive Km and Vmax.
note.zh: V₀ = Vmax × [S] / (Km + [S])。非线性回归：GraphPad Prism、scipy.optimize.curve_fit 或 R nls()。获得 Km 和 Vmax。

note.en: kcat (s⁻¹) = catalytic constant. kcat/Km (M⁻¹s⁻¹) = catalytic efficiency. Typical: kcat 0.001–10,000 s⁻¹; kcat/Km up to 10⁹ M⁻¹s⁻¹ (diffusion limit).
note.zh: kcat（s⁻¹）= 催化常数。kcat/Km（M⁻¹s⁻¹）= 催化效率。典型范围：kcat 0.001–10,000 s⁻¹；kcat/Km 最高 10⁹ M⁻¹s⁻¹（扩散极限）。

note.en: Competitive: Km↑, Vmax same. Noncompetitive: Vmax↓, Km same. Uncompetitive: both↓. Use Lineweaver-Burk or global fitting.
note.zh: 竞争性：Km↑、Vmax 不变。非竞争性：Vmax↓、Km 不变。反竞争性：两者↓。用 Lineweaver-Burk 双倒数图或全局拟合分析。

notes.en: Common coupled assays: LDH for pyruvate-generating; PK-LDH for ATPases; NADH at 340 nm. Controls: (a) no enzyme, (b) heat-inactivated, (c) no substrate. Report: Km, Vmax, kcat, kcat/Km, temp, pH, buffer.
notes.zh: 常用偶联法：LDH 偶联丙酮酸生成酶；PK-LDH 偶联 ATPase；NADH 340 nm。对照：(a) 无酶、(b) 热灭活、(c) 无底物。报告：Km、Vmax、kcat、kcat/Km、温度、pH、缓冲条件。

ref: Johnson & Goody (2011) Biochemistry 50(39):8264–8269; Copeland (2000) Enzymes 2nd ed. Wiley-VCH; Bisswanger (2014) Perspect Sci 1:41–55

usage.en: Determine enzyme kinetic parameters (Km, Vmax) by Michaelis-Menten analysis.
usage.zh: Michaelis-Menten 分析测定酶动力学参数（Km、Vmax）。

briefSteps.en: Purify and quantify enzyme → establish buffer conditions → determine linear reaction range → prepare substrate concentration series (0.1×–10×Km) → run reactions at fixed [E] and temperature → stop at linear-range timepoint → measure signal → fit V₀ vs [S] to Michaelis-Menten → calculate Km, Vmax, kcat.
briefSteps.zh: 纯化并定量酶 → 确定缓冲条件 → 确定线性反应范围 → 配制底物浓度系列（0.1×–10×Km）→ 固定 [E] 和温度下进行反应 → 在线性范围时间点终止 → 检测信号 → V₀ vs [S] 米氏方程拟合 → 计算 Km、Vmax、kcat。

detailedSteps.en: Confirm enzyme purity by SDS-PAGE and Coomassie staining (>90% homogeneity). Quantify enzyme concentration by BCA or Bradford assay. Use freshly purified enzyme or thaw an aliquot on ice.
detailedSteps.zh: SDS-PAGE + 考马斯蓝染色确认酶纯度（>90%），BCA 或 Bradford 定量酶浓度，使用新鲜纯化酶或在冰上解冻分装品。

detailedSteps.en: Prepare assay buffer: typically 50 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 5 mM MgCl₂, 1 mM DTT, 0.01% BSA. Optimize pH, ionic strength, and cofactors for your specific enzyme if needed.
detailedSteps.zh: 配制反应缓冲液：通常为 50 mM HEPES pH 7.5、5 mM MgCl₂、1 mM DTT、0.01% BSA，根据酶的特性优化 pH、离子强度和辅因子。

detailedSteps.en: Determine the linear reaction range: measure product formation vs time at saturating substrate (10×Km). Sample at 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 30 min. Choose a timepoint where <10% substrate is consumed and product is linear.
detailedSteps.zh: 确定线性范围：在饱和底物浓度（10×Km）下测量产物随时间的生成量，在 0、5、10、15、20、30 min 取样，选择底物消耗 <10% 且产物线性增加的时间点。

detailedSteps.en: Prepare a substrate concentration series covering 0.1×Km to 10×Km (6–8 points, e.g., 1, 5, 10, 25, 50, 100, 250, 500 µM). Include a no-substrate control ([S]=0). Prepare in assay buffer at 2× final concentration.
detailedSteps.zh: 配制底物浓度系列，覆盖 0.1×Km 至 10×Km（6–8 点，如 1、5、10、25、50、100、250、500 µM），包含无底物对照（[S]=0），以反应缓冲液配制至 2× 终浓度。

detailedSteps.en: Set up reactions in 96-well plate or cuvettes. Add buffer, substrate, and any cofactors. Pre-equilibrate to assay temperature (25–37°C) for 5 min. Start all reactions simultaneously by adding enzyme (10–100 nM final) last. Include ≥3 replicates per substrate concentration.
detailedSteps.zh: 在 96 孔板或比色杯中依次加入缓冲液、底物和辅因子，在反应温度（25–37°C）预平衡 5 min，最后加酶（终浓度 10–100 nM）启动反应，每个底物浓度设 ≥3 个重复。

detailedSteps.en: Stop all reactions at the predetermined linear-range timepoint using the appropriate method: add TCA (10% final) or HCl for colorimetric assays, or switch to continuous kinetics mode (NADH-linked assay at A₃₄₀). Include a heat-inactivated enzyme control.
detailedSteps.zh: 在预定线性范围时间点统一终止反应：比色法加 TCA（终浓度 10%）或 HCl；NADH 偶联法采用连续监测 A₃₄₀ 模式。包含热灭活酶对照。

detailedSteps.en: Measure signal by spectrophotometry or fluorescence. Convert absorbance to product concentration using the molar extinction coefficient (e.g., NADH: ε₃₄₀ = 6,220 M⁻¹cm⁻¹). Calculate initial velocity V₀ = Δ[product]/Δtime.
detailedSteps.zh: 分光光度法或荧光法检测信号，用摩尔消光系数（如 NADH：ε₃₄₀ = 6,220 M⁻¹cm⁻¹）将吸光度换算为产物浓度，计算初速率 V₀ = Δ[产物]/Δ时间。

detailedSteps.en: Plot V₀ versus [S] and fit to the Michaelis-Menten equation: V₀ = Vmax × [S] / (Km + [S]) using nonlinear regression (GraphPad Prism, scipy.optimize.curve_fit, or R nls()). Extract Km and Vmax from the fit.
detailedSteps.zh: 以 V₀ 对 [S] 作图，用非线性回归拟合米氏方程 V₀ = Vmax × [S] / (Km + [S])（GraphPad Prism、scipy.optimize.curve_fit 或 R nls()），从拟合结果获得 Km 和 Vmax。

detailedSteps.en: Calculate kcat = Vmax / [E]total (s⁻¹) and catalytic efficiency kcat/Km (M⁻¹s⁻¹). Report values with 95% confidence intervals. Typical ranges: Km µM–mM; kcat 0.001–10,000 s⁻¹; kcat/Km up to 10⁹ M⁻¹s⁻¹.
detailedSteps.zh: 计算 kcat = Vmax / [E]total（s⁻¹）和催化效率 kcat/Km（M⁻¹s⁻¹），报告值附 95% 置信区间。典型范围：Km µM–mM；kcat 0.001–10,000 s⁻¹；kcat/Km 最高 10⁹ M⁻¹s⁻¹。

detailedSteps.en: Optional: determine inhibition kinetics by repeating the substrate series at 2–3 inhibitor concentrations. Distinguish inhibition mechanism (competitive, noncompetitive, uncompetitive) by Lineweaver-Burk plot or global curve fitting.
detailedSteps.zh: 可选：在 2–3 个抑制剂浓度下重复底物系列实验，通过 Lineweaver-Burk 双倒数图或全局拟合区分抑制类型（竞争性、非竞争性、反竞争性）。

note.en: Purified enzyme aliquots can be snap-frozen in liquid nitrogen and stored at −80°C until use.
note.zh: 纯化酶可分装后液氮速冻，−80°C 保存备用。

note.en: Stopped reactions (in TCA or HCl) can be stored on ice for up to 2 h before reading; for colorimetric products, read promptly.
note.zh: TCA 或 HCl 终止的反应可在冰上放置最长 2 h 再读数；比色法产物应尽快读数。
